The '''Felpajh 10A''' was a luxury suborbital [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] manufactured by [[Larjh StarCorporation]]. These shuttles were commonly used to transport passengers from the ground to a waiting [[Luxury liner/Legends|liner]].

The Felpajh 10A could accommodate up to eight passengers, in addition to five [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo, and provided its users with a high level of luxury during flight. It required a single, dedicated [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] to operate, and could achieve a maximum speed of 750 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per hour.

{{Ship-stub}}
